name: @openclaw/openclaw-host-git-workflow
description: Host-backed git workflow plugin for OpenClaw with bundled skill, single send_to_git entrypoint, and bounded runtime slices for planning, repo resolution, live host node binding, preflight, push, PR creation, checks wait, merge, and sync-main.
author: TeodorArg

scripts.lint: biome check index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.pack:smoke: rm -rf .pack && mkdir -p .pack && pnpm pack --pack-destination .pack && tar -tf .pack/*.tgz > .pack/contents.txt && grep -Fx 'package/dist/index.js' .pack/contents.txt && grep -Fx 'package/openclaw.plugin.json' .pack/contents.txt && grep -Fx 'package/skills/openclaw-host-git-workflow/SKILL.md' .pack/contents.txt && grep -Fx 'package/README.md' .pack/contents.txt && grep -Fx 'package/LICENSE' .pack/contents.txt
